series.title: Wild Earth

episodes.title: Mountains Above the Clouds
episodes.synopsis: Soar over snow-capped peaks and witness the wildlife that thrives in the planet's highest places.

episodes.title: Desert Survivors
episodes.synopsis: Discover how plants and animals endure extreme heat and scarce water in the world's driest deserts.

episodes.title: Frozen Frontiers
episodes.synopsis: Travel to the polar regions where ice and snow dominate, yet life finds a way to adapt.

episodes.title: Rainforest Kingdoms
episodes.synopsis: Immerse yourself in lush rainforests teeming with life from the canopy to the forest floor.

episodes.title: Grassland Giants
episodes.synopsis: Follow herds of grazing animals and the predators that stalk them across open plains.

episodes.title: Hidden Worlds
episodes.synopsis: Explore caves, wetlands, and other overlooked habitats that support extraordinary life.

episodes.title: Shallow Seas
episodes.synopsis: Meet the vibrant communities that thrive in the sunlit waters near the coast.

episodes.title: Coral Kingdoms
episodes.synopsis: Dive into coral reefs, the rainforests of the sea, and uncover their delicate balance.

episodes.title: Open Ocean
episodes.synopsis: Journey across the vast blue deserts where only the hardiest travelers survive.

episodes.title: Deep Abyss
episodes.synopsis: Descend into the dark depths to encounter bizarre lifeforms adapted to crushing pressure.

episodes.title: Canopy Life
episodes.synopsis: Climb into the treetops to discover the animals that rarely touch the ground.

episodes.title: Forest Floor
episodes.synopsis: From decomposers to large mammals, explore life on the forest floor.

episodes.title: Changing Seasons
episodes.synopsis: See how forests transform through the year and how wildlife keeps pace.

episodes.title: Kitchen Chemistry
episodes.synopsis: Simple and safe experiments using items found in most kitchens.

episodes.title: Gravity Games
episodes.synopsis: Explore gravity with fun drop tests and ramps.

episodes.title: Amazing Air
episodes.synopsis: Learn about air pressure and wind with balloon and bottle experiments.

episodes.title: New Beginnings
episodes.synopsis: A group of strangers move into the same apartment building and their lives start to intersect.

episodes.title: Crossed Paths
episodes.synopsis: Misunderstandings and chance encounters bring the neighbors closer together.

episodes.title: Hidden Truths
episodes.synopsis: Secrets from the past begin to surface, testing new friendships.

episodes.title: Turning Points
episodes.synopsis: Each resident faces a decision that could change their life in the city.
